content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-feedback framework can be augmented by injecting multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional training while improving output quality far beyond what either approach achieves alone. This hybrid approach leverages the consistency of iterative self-feedback and the novelty of multi-perspective critical thinking to avoid the local optima traps that plague single-perspective refinement.
